purpose: Visual similarity iteration against nucleus baseline images in one Blender scene.
iteration_notes: Iteration 1 had overlapping text and clipped reference panels.
Iteration 2 reduced label size, reframed the board camera, separated reference panels, and scaled the candidate model.
Iteration 3 widened the orthographic board view and reduced model scale.
Iteration 4 corrected the board axis layout so reference images and 3D sections are arranged in X/Z rather than disappearing into depth.
Iteration 5 moved reference panels inward so the board camera shows baselines, candidate, and detail sections in one frame.
improvements_over_phase_2: Stronger cutaway read for outer membrane, lumen, and inner membrane.
Denser pore distribution with visible raised subunits and gate cores.
More complete gold lamina lattice inside the envelope.
Reference images and 3D sections are placed in the same Blender scene for direct inspection.
remaining_issues: Still needs a real Roblox LOD1 simplification before production import.
Materials remain Blender visual targets and need Roblox fallback validation.
This phase is visual iteration only; not yet a finalized export mesh package.
approved_next_step: Use this Phase 3 visual direction to update the production nucleus builder or continue iterating if visual score target is above 90.
